pair.title: Connect Pixii Home
pair.intro: Enter the MQTT broker details configured in the Pixii gateway. Pixii's documentation uses Broker 2 for external integrations, and this app recommends it as the first choice. Only one system should publish control commands.
pair.missing: Broker address and serial number are required

errors.connection_changed: The MQTT connection changed before the command completed
errors.auth_rejected: MQTT login was rejected. Check the username and password in Advanced Settings.
errors.ack_timeout: Timed out while waiting for a response from Pixii
errors.status_timeout: No recent status has been received from Pixii
errors.soc_limits: The raw SoC value shown as 100% must be higher than the value shown as 0%.
